reasons: VIX regime stable — good for weekly holds
Macro data inline with expectations — less directional clarity

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (8.35) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 4.2% move to $288.35 (weekly expected move: 9.0%).

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (3.45) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 2.1% move to $48.45 (weekly expected move: 11.6%).

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (0.71) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 1.4% move to $17.21 (weekly expected move: 11.4%).
